name: Bone Devil

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
traits.text: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Bone Devil

*Large Fiend (Devil), Lawful Evil*

A skeletal infernal enforcer with a scorpion tail, feared even by other devils.

### Actions

**Claw.** Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

**Infernal Sting.** Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Piercing damage plus 18 (4d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the devil’s next turn. While Poisoned, the target can’t regain Hit Points.
